title: Plugins marketplace, live on the web
summary: Browse every plugin xNet ships out of the box and everything the community builds — on the website and inside the app — and publish your own with a one-line PR.
highlights: A new /plugins page with search, categories, and per-plugin detail pages
In-app Browse tab installs community plugins through a capability-consent gate
Publish via a metadata PR — your code stays in your repo and updates ship automatically
